name: discord
description: Discord channel for Claude Code with Agent Bridge access control. Self-contained MCP server: pairing, allowlists, guild-channel mention-triggering. Surfaces reply references (referenced_message_id / referenced_message_excerpt) on inbound replies plus a reply marker on fetch_messages so agents know exactly which message a Discord reply targets, and supports per-agent Discord thread-as-session (set DISCORD_THREAD_AUTO_SESSION_CHANNEL_ID). Pairing/allowlist/policy via /discord:access.
